get.description: Return Feishu integration health.

post.description: Dispatch URL verification, events, bot messages, and card callbacks.

get.description: API information endpoint.

Get circuit breaker status.

Returns the current LLM Gateway circuit breaker state.

post.description:
Reset the circuit breaker.

Manually resets the circuit breaker state to CLOSED for operations
scenarios where the LLM service has recovered.

get.description:
Get LLM usage statistics.

Returns usage statistics for the selected date, including:
- Total calls and success/failure distribution.
- Token usage.
- Cost statistics.
- Grouped statistics by agent and task type.

parameters.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.
parameters.name: date

schema.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.
schema.title: Date

get.description: Return runtime status summaries backed by control-plane records only.

schema.title: Response List Agent Runtime Statuses Api V1 Agents Get

get.description: Return the persisted system-prompt override for an agent detail page.

schema.title: Response Get Agent Prompt Config Api V1 Agents  Agent Id  Prompt Config Get

put.description: Persist a system-prompt override used by deployed agent runtime code.

schema.title: Response Update Agent Prompt Config Api V1 Agents  Agent Id  Prompt Config Put

get.description: Return one runtime status backed by control-plane records only.

schema.title: Response Get Agent Runtime Status Api V1 Agents  Agent Id  Status Get

get.description: Return root approval list alias backed by durable control-plane approvals.

schema.title: Response List Pending Approvals Api V1 Approvals Get

get.description: SSE endpoint used by the WebUI cache invalidation listener.

Export a PRD document.

Generates a product requirements document from existing requirements.
Supports filtering by requirement status.
Download a PRD document as a Markdown file.

Export a question list.

Exports open clarification questions for the next discussion.
Download a question list as a Markdown file.
Expose readiness in the shape used by the WebUI monitor page.

schema.title: Response Webui Readiness Api V1 Health Ready Get

post.description:
Feishu webhook callback.

Receives Feishu meeting summary webhook events.

Manually upload meeting content.

Supports WeChat chat logs, manually curated meeting notes, and similar
source material.

get.description: List meetings.

Search messages with optional filters and full-text search.

Supports:
- Full-text search by keyword (Chinese supported)
- Filtering by chat_id, sender_id, time range
- Pagination

Get all messages in a session.

Returns messages ordered by sent_at ASC with session metadata.
List all unanswered questions.

schema.title: Response List Open Questions Api V1 Questions Open Get

get.description: List requirements.

post.description: Analyze text and provide intelligent suggestions without creating a requirement.

Batch-confirm requirements.

Confirms multiple requirements in one request for batch workflows.

Batch-reject requirements.

Rejects multiple requirements with the same rejection reason.

Check requirement conflicts.

Checks whether a new or updated requirement conflicts with, duplicates, or
updates existing requirements. Returns the relation and suggested action.

get.description:
Semantically search requirements.

Uses the vector database for semantic matching and returns the most
relevant requirements for the query.

delete.description:
Delete a requirement.

Deletes related questions and vector-store records as well. Emits a
requirement.deleted event after deletion.

get.description: Get requirement details.

post.description:
Analyze a requirement and provide intelligent suggestions.

Returns:
- Category suggestion.
- Priority suggestion.
- Complexity estimate.
- Dependency analysis.
- Risk assessment.

get.description:
Get the context messages that led to this requirement.

Returns the requirement along with its source messages and session info.

Get a requirement change diff.

Compares requirement state changes across two points in its history.

Get requirement change history.

Returns all change records for the requirement, including:
- Creation.
- Confirmation or rejection.
- Updates.
- Status changes.

Find similar requirements.

Finds other semantically similar requirements for the selected requirement.
Useful for duplicate or related requirement discovery.
Get statistics.
Get enhanced statistics with trends.
Return WeCom integration health.

Verify the WeCom callback URL.

WeCom sends this GET request during callback URL setup.
